# SpeakLab

> SpeakLab (also written "Speak Lab" or "SpeakLab by Shayan") is an 8-week English Communication and Confidence Program based in Lahore, Pakistan.

## What is SpeakLab?

SpeakLab helps Pakistani students and young professionals speak English fluently, confidently, and fearlessly through a structured 8-week program. Classes are held in-person at Punjab Tianjin University of Technology, Lahore, with small batches for maximum personal attention.

## Free Trial Classes

Not sure yet? SpeakLab offers Free Trial Classes: attend 3 full sessions at no cost and with no obligation before deciding to enroll. You join a real running batch, meet the instructor, and only pay if you continue.
Book: https://www.speaklabbyshayan.com/trial-classes.html

## Program Details

- Duration: 8 weeks, 24 total sessions
- Sessions: Flexible days (Regular & Weekend Batches), 5:00 PM – 6:45 PM
- Location: Punjab Tianjin University of Technology, Lahore
- Batch size: Maximum 20 students (limited seats)
- Price: PKR 20,000 total — PKR 10,000 advance to secure seat, PKR 10,000 balance by 5th of next month
- Certificate: Yes, SpeakLab Certificate of Completion awarded on finishing
- Language of Instruction: English (Urdu support available)

## Curriculum

- Spoken English Mastery: Speak naturally and fluently in any situation without hesitation
- Public Speaking & Confidence: Overcome stage fright and build unshakeable self-belief
- Professional Communication: Soft skills and business etiquette for the corporate world
- Interview Preparation: Hands-on practice to ace job interviews
- Critical Thinking & Expression: Think on your feet and respond intelligently

## Who is it for?

- University students struggling with English confidence
- Fresh graduates preparing for job interviews
- Working professionals wanting to communicate better in English
- Anyone who knows English grammar but freezes when actually speaking

## Instructor

Sir Shayan — an experienced English communication coach passionate about helping students unlock their true potential. His dynamic teaching style combines theory with real-world practice.

- Free English Level Test (CEFR): https://www.speaklabbyshayan.com/level-test.html

## Current Batch

August 2026 batch — limited to 20 seats — PKR 10,000 advance secures your place

## Location

Punjab Tianjin University of Technology, Lahore, Punjab, Pakistan
